titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 622

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=52 status=reviewed modified=2023-06-06 15:19:34.035567+00 | translation moa=51 status=reviewed modified=2023-06-06 15:19:34.048707+00

p.cl:
Alexander . dei Gratia Rex Scott’ . Episcopis . Abbatibus . Comitibus . Baronibus . Iustic’ . Vicecomitibus . Prepositis .
Ministris . ⁊ Omnibus probis hominibus tocius terre sue . Clericis et laicis  Salutem .

Sciant presentes ⁊ futuri .
me . concessisse . ⁊ hac carta mea confirmasse . Diuisas inter Coldingham’ . ⁊ Bonekill’ . Tenendas . Ita
libere . et quiete . plenarie ⁊ honorifice  sicut Carta Regis . DauiD . proaui mei ⁊ Carta domini Regis . Willelmi
patris mei testantur ⁊ confirmant . scilicet a Midlesdeneheued . per Mereburnesheued . uersus occidentem usque
ad Crhachoctrestrete . ⁊ inde per e[ande]m stratam usque ad Eyford’ .

Testibus . Willelmo de Boscho . Cancellario .
meo . Comite Malcolmo . de Fif’ Philippo de lundin’ . DauiD . Marescallo . Heruico . Marescallo . Adam . Hasteng

div.p: Alexander, by the Grace of God king of Scots, to Bishops, Abbots, Earls, Barons, Justices, Sheriffs, Provosts, Officials, and All worthy men of all his land, clerk and lay : Greeting. Let present and future know that I have granted, and by this my charter made firm, the boundaries between Coldingham and Bunkle, to be held as freely and quitly, fully and honourably, as the charter of King David my great-grandfather and the charter of the lord King William my father bear witness and confirm, that is, from 'Midlesdeneheued' by 'Mereburnesheued' westwards to 'Crhachoctrestrete' and by the same path to Eiford. As witnesses William del Bois, my Chancellor; Earl Malcolm of Fife; Philip of Lundin; David the Marischal; Hervey the Marischal; Adam Hastings. At Selkirk, on the last [day of ...]
